commands.review_summary:
The branch adds QA Lab runtime env hooks for Crabline fake providers, Slack WebClient API URL override support, and WhatsApp preload/auth staging tests.

PR surface: Source +382, Tests +181. Total +563 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects by source inspection: the locked Crabline package advertises only Telegram, while the PR guard rejects unsupported channels, and @slack/web-api uses slackApiUrl as the authenticated Axios base URL. I did not execute a spawned gateway run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are a Crabline dependency/API contract and a maintainer security/product decision for the Slack endpoint env, not a narrow autonomous repair lane.

commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainers need to accept the narrow auth-provider compatibility behavior and wait for exact-head gates; there is no concrete ClawSweeper code repair to queue.; Cleared: The diff touches OAuth refresh routing but keeps token endpoints constrained to trusted x.ai discovery and adds no dependency, workflow, or secret-handling expansion. (sha=c9b7b65f01e5b1fd01802092dce85ebf497d7fbf)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an xAI OAuth refresh compatibility path that rediscovers the current token endpoint when a saved credential contains the retired `https://auth.x.ai/oauth/token` endpoint, with regression tests for rediscovery and discovery failure.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +61. Total +82 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the narrow stale-endpoint state: current main posts refreshes to a saved `tokenEndpoint`, live xAI discovery advertises `/oauth2/token`, and live dummy probes show `/oauth/token` returns Cloudflare HTML. The broader source of those stale saved values is still not proven.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to accept the narrow auth-provider compatibility behavior and wait for exact-head gates; there is no concrete ClawSweeper code repair to queue.
